titleStmt.title: SII 16.145: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswami and G. S. Gai
No. 145. (A.R. No. 376 of 1926.) TAṄGĒḌA, PALNAD TALUK, GUNTUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab set up in front of the deserted temple of Sītārāmasvāmin in the fort.
This is dated Śaka 1467, Viśvāvasu, Vaiśākha śu. 5, Thursday, corresponding to 1545 A.D., April 16.

It registers the exemption from taxes on the vṛittis granted to the gods and brāhmaṇas in Taṅgēḍa-sīma by Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Nandyāla Avubhaḷarāju who was administrating over the sīma. States that Pāpinēniṅgāru, the kāryakarta of the chief had this inscription set up.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī jeyābhyudaya śālivāhana śakava¨rṣaṁ
bulu 1467 Agunēṭi viśvāvasu saṁvatsara vaiśākha
śuddha 5 gu rājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrīvīra . pa
tāpa sadāśivarāyamahārāyaluṁgāru
pṛthivirājyaṁ śēyucuṁḍagānu śrīmanmahā
maṁḍalēśvara naṁdyāla Avubhaḷadēva mahārāju
lugāru taṁgeḍa taṁgeḍa sīma mahājanālku pāliṁci
na dharmaśilāśāsanamu sadāśivamahārāyalu
vāru mā nāyaṁkarānaku pāliṁcina taṁgēḍa sīmalōni dēva brā
hmaṇa vṛttikṣētrālu sa¨rvvamānyamugānu sāgiṁcci pūrvamaṁ
du peṭṭē puṭṭi tūmulu māni sa¨rvvamānyamugānu sēsu(si)
Istimi mī putrapautrapāraṁparyamu Ācaṁdrā¨rkasthāyi
gānu Anabhaviṁci bratikēdi yī śilāśāsanamu vēyiṁci
na vāru naṁdyāla Avubhaḷa dēvamahārāyaluṁgāri
kāryaka¨rttalaina tanniśu pāpinēnigāru nilipina śilāśāsanamu
yī dha¨rmānaku yavvaru dappinānu kāśilōnu mā
tāpitṛvadhacēśi gōhatya braṁhmahatya cēśina pāpāna
pōvuvāru . dānapālanayō¨rmadhyē dānā chrē
yōnu pālanaṁ . dānātsva¨rgamavāpnōti pā
lanādacyutaṁ padaṁ . Ēkaiva bhaginī lōkē sa¨rvē
ṣāmēva bhūbhujāṁ . na
bhōgyā na kara grāhyā vi
pradattā vasuṁdharā .
śrī śrī .
Digital edition of SII 16.145 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
